name: Tanyatanee Country Club
source_notes: Listed in aggregate directories as Chiang Mai province. 'Tanyatanee' (ธัญธาเนีย or ธัญจรีย์) could be a local estate/resort name in the Chiang Mai area. No hole count, fees, phone, designer, or specific sub-location within Chiang Mai province found in any source. If it exists as an 18-hole course, it would fit in the chiang-mai data region rather than north-misc.
